<!-- SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT OR Apache-2.0 -->

## Mechanical change

Describe the functionality and exact execution boundary changed.

## Compatibility

Note public API, serialized contract, digest-domain, native binding, or feature
changes. Write `none` when there is no compatibility impact.

## Validation

List the commands and focused fixtures run. Do not infer model efficacy from
mechanical tests.

## Checklist

- [ ] Public documentation matches the implementation.
- [ ] Failure, bounds, and arbitrary-byte behavior are covered where relevant.
- [ ] No private artifacts, model weights, secrets, or internal paths are included.
- [ ] New source files carry `SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT OR Apache-2.0`.
